source: ESPN / CBS Sports / Fox Sports / NFL.com

data.value: Defending Super Bowl LX champions opened as 2027 co-favorites after dismantling the Patriots 29-13. Offensive play-caller Klint Kubiak departed, raising continuity questions.
Offensive play-caller Klint Kubiak is departing this offseason, which may affect continuity on offense and is the primary concern entering 2026-27.
Patrick Mahomes tore his ACL and LCL in Week 15 of the 2025 season and is targeting a Week 1 return, but Travis Kelce is weighing retirement and the team has projected negative cap space of -$35.5M.
Matthew Stafford appears far healthier entering the offseason after an MVP-worthy season at 37. Strong cap space among playoff teams and a defensive front that plays at elite level.
Josh Allen provides an MVP-caliber engine with elite offensive line and All-Pro backfield support. Since Joe Brady was elevated in 2023, the Bills rank second in points per game at 29.1.
The Bills could not take advantage of a golden opportunity to reach the Super Bowl with both the Chiefs and Ravens out. The receiving corps needs significant offseason attention.
New head coach Jesse Minter inherits a talented team with Lamar Jackson and Derrick Henry. Defense expected to improve significantly with fresh schematic life under OC Declan Doyle.
Lamar Jackson was limited significantly by injuries in 2025, rarely making it through a full practice week. The interior offensive line also needs reinforcement.
Trevor Lawrence posted a 113.2 passer rating with a 15-1 TD-INT ratio in the final six games of 2025. May draft elite CB Travis Hunter to address the secondary. Top five value bet for Super Bowl LXI.

History shows Super Bowl runner-ups often fall off considerably the following year, and New England's 2025 schedule was the easiest by any team since the 1999 Rams, making their record harder to repeat.
Jordan Love has reached elite quarterback status. Key pieces lost to injury in 2025 expected back — could vault Green Bay into true Super Bowl contention.
Analysts argue the 49ers are undervalued for 2026. Despite injuries, they still won 12 games. With full health restored to Bosa, Warner and Kittle, expect NFC championship contention.
At least one major analyst compared the Eagles to the 2014 Seahawks at their dynasty peak, citing Philadelphia's dominant run game and nasty young defense.
